zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter FitzRobert Hill於1604年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特威爾斯時，他的父親Peter Hill25歲，母親Mrs. Anne Hill27歲。他於1631年與Mary Hill在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1653年住在美國緬因州約克薩可且於1653年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他於1633年在美國緬因州波藍德被列為sailor and boat maker。他去世於1667年8月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾薩可享年63歲，埋葬在美國緬因州約克薩可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter FitzRobert Hill于1604年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特威爾斯时，他的父亲Peter Hill25岁，母亲Mrs. Anne Hill27岁。他于1631年与Mary Hill在英国英格兰坎布利其爾斯瓦福哈姆 普萊爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1653年住在美国缅因州約克薩可且于1653年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他于1633年在美国缅因州波藍德被列为sailor and boat maker。他去世于1667年8月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾薩可享年63岁，埋葬在美国缅因州約克薩可。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States
1630: Charter granted to establish a town at Saco. 1631: Settled. 1775: Incorporated as the Town of Pepperellborough. 1805:  Renamed Saco. 1867: Incorporated as a City.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter FitzRobert Hill was born in 1604, in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Peter Hill, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Anne Hill, was 27. He married Mary Hill in 1631, in Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He lived in Saco, York, Maine, United States in 1653 and Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1653. In 1633, at the age of 29, his occupation is listed as sailor and boat maker in Cumberland, Maine, United States. He died on 29 August 1667, in Saco, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63, and was buried in Saco, York, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter FitzRobert Hill est né en 1604, à Wells, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Peter Hill, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Anne Hill, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Mary Hill en 1631, à Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il a vécu à Saco, York, Maine, États-Unis en 1653 et à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1653. En 1633, à l’âge de 29 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sailor and boat maker à Cumberland, Maine, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 29 août 1667, à Saco, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Saco, York, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter FitzRobert Hill 1604 in Wells, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Hill 25 und seine Mutter Mrs. Anne Hill 27. Er hat 1631 in Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Mary Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1653 hat er in Saco, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten und 1653 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. 1633, als er 29 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sailor and boat maker in Cumberland, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. August 1667 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Saco, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Saco, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter FitzRobert Hill è nato il nel 1604 nel Wells, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Peter Hill, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Anne Hill, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Mary Hill nel 1631, nel Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Vissuto a Saco, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1653 e nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1653. Nel 1633, all'età di 29 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sailor and boat maker nel Cumberland, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 29 agosto 1667, nel Saco, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Saco, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter FitzRobert Hillが1604年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウエルズで生まれた時，父Peter Hillは25歳，母Mrs. Anne Hillは27歳であった。1631年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアスワフハム プリオルでMary Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1653年にはアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークサコに，1653年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに住んでいた。1633年，29歳の時，アメリカ合衆国メイン州クウンバーランドでの職業はsailor and boat makerと記録されている。彼は1667年8月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークシュアイアサコで63歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークサコにて埋葬された。

ko.Came to America on the \"Huntress\": 캐나다 온타리오주 리드즈 앤드 그렌빌 엘리자베스타운-키틀리 톨도
ko.Biddeford, York, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 비데퍼드
ko.Saco, York, Maine, United States: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 사코
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.lifeSummary: Peter FitzRobert Hill(이)가 1604년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Hill(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Anne Hill(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1631년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 스와프함 프리어에서 Mary Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1653년도에 미국 메인 주 요르크 사코에서, 1653년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 살았다. 1633년, 29세의 나이로 그의 직업은 미국 메인 주 c벌랜드에서 sailor and boat maker이었다. 그는 1667년 8월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 사코에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 요르크 사코에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter FitzRobert Hill nasceu em 1604, em Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Peter Hill, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Anne Hill, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Hill em 1631, em Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele viveu em Saco, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América em 1653 e em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1653. Em 1633, com 29 anos, sua profissão aparece como sailor and boat maker em Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 29 de agosto de 1667, em Saco, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Saco, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter FitzRobert Hill родился в 1604 г. в местности веллс, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Peter Hill было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Anne Hill, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Hill в 1631 г. в местности сваффхам приор, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он жил в местности сако, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты в 1653 году и в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1653 году. В 1633 году, в возрасте 29 лет,  он работал по профессии sailor and boat maker в местности кумбирланд, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 29 августа 1667 г. в местности сако, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности сако, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter FitzRobert Hill nació en 1604, en Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Peter Hill, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs. Anne Hill, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Mary Hill en 1631, en Swaffham Prior, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Vivió en Saco, York, Maine, Estados Unidos en 1653 y en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1653. En 1633, a la edad de 29 años, su ocupación registrada era sailor and boat maker en Cumberland, Maine, Estados Unidos. Murió el 29 de agosto de 1667, en Saco, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Saco, York, Maine, Estados Unidos.
